description: Negative fixture cases for the preview/designer/publish qualification packet. Rust tests mutate the canonical packet per case and assert the expected check fires.

cases.summary: A Stable row cannot use approximate, unsupported, generated-only, or snapshot-only mapping.
A Stable publish/deploy row must expose dry run or closest safe preview.
A generated, live, imported, cached, or snapshot row must show generated/source lineage.
A side-effectful Stable row must keep preview/apply/revert lineage exportable.
